content.name: Ware Overview Tab
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
Adds a [b]Ware Overview[/b] tab to the [b]Property Owned[/b] menu in the map. Lists all wares present at player-owned stations, grouped by transport type (Container, Solid, Liquid, Condensate), with total stock, production and consumption per hour, and station count. Each ware row is expandable to a per-station breakdown.
[h2][b]Features[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Ware Overview tab[/b]: A dedicated tab in the Property Owned menu lists all wares that are stocked, produced, or consumed at player-owned stations. [*] [b]Grouped by transport type[/b]: Wares are organised under collapsible section headers: Container Storage, Solid Storage, Liquid Storage, and Condensate Storage. [*] [b]Per-ware summary row[/b]: Each ware shows a ware icon with name, total production per hour (green), total consumption per hour (red), total stock across all stations, and the number of stations that handle it. [*] [b]Expandable to per-station detail[/b]: Click the [b]+[/b] button on a ware row to expand it and see a sub-row for each station that handles that ware. The sub-row shows the station name with sector below, per-station production/h, consumption/h, and current stock. [*] [b]Logical Station Overview button[/b]: Each station sub-row has a button to open the Logical Station Overview for that station. [*] [b]Empty state[/b]: If no wares are found at player stations, a clear message is shown. [*] [b]Cached data[/b]: Ware and station data are refreshed periodically to avoid redundant lookups every render. [*] [b]Configurable refresh interval[/b]: The data refresh interval (1-10 ticks, default 3) can be adjusted in [b]Extension options[/b]. [*] [b]Tab positioning[/b]: The tab is placed after the [b]Production Stations[/b] tab when that mod is also installed, otherwise after the [b]Stations[/b] tab. [*] [b]Compatible with X4 8.00 and 9.00 beta[/b]. [/list] [h2][b]Requirements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]8.00HF4[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v8.0.4.x[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]: [list] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/552]UI Extensions and HUD[/url] [/list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]9.00 beta 3[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v9.0.0.0.3[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]. [*] [b]Mod Support APIs[/b]: Version 1.95 or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url]: [list] [*] Available on Steam: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2042901274]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/url] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/503]Mod Support APIs[/url]. [/list] [/list] [h2][b]Installation[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Steam Workshop[/b]: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3712869644]Station Storage Allocation[/url] - only for [b]Game version 8.00[/b] with latest Steam version of the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] mod (version 80.43 from April 8). [*] [b]Nexus Mods[/b]: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/2079]Station Storage Allocation[/url] [/list] [h2][b]Usage[/b][/h2]
Open the map, switch to the [b]Property Owned[/b] panel, and click the [b]Ware Overview[/b] tab in the tab strip.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-WareOverviewTab/refs/heads/main/docs/images/ware_overview_tab.png[/img]
All wares present at player-owned stations are listed, grouped by transport type. Each group has a section header that can be collapsed.
[h2]Ware row[/h2]
Each ware row contains: [list] [*] [b]+/-[/b] expand button on the left (only shown when at least one station handles the ware). [*] Ware icon and name. [*] Total production per hour (shown in green). [*] Total consumption per hour (shown in red). [*] Total stock across all player stations. [*] Number of player stations handling this ware ([b]--[/b] when none). [/list] [h2]Station sub-row[/h2]
Click [b]+[/b] on a ware row to expand it. Each station that handles the ware gets a sub-row: [list] [*] Station name with sector shown below it. [*] Per-station production per hour (green) and consumption per hour (red). [*] Current stock at that station. [*] [b]Logical Station Overview[/b] button to open the station inventory and build plan. [/list] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-WareOverviewTab/refs/heads/main/docs/images/ware_overview_stations.png[/img]
[h2]Extension options[/h2]
[b]Options Menu > Extension options > Ware Overview Tab[/b]: [list] [*] [b]Data refresh interval[/b] (1-10, default 3): Number of UI ticks between data refreshes. Lower values keep station and ware data more up to date; higher values reduce CPU usage. [/list] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-WareOverviewTab/refs/heads/main/docs/images/options.png[/img]
[h2][b]Credits[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Author[/b]: Chem O`Dun, on [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Nexus Mods[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Steam Workshop[/url] [*] [i]"X4: Foundations"[/i] is a trademark of [url=https://www.egosoft.com]Egosoft[/url]. [/list] [h2][b]Acknowledgements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [url=https://www.egosoft.com]EGOSOFT[/url] - for the X series. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url] - for the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] that makes this extension possible. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url] - for the [b]Mod Support APIs[/b] that power the UI hooks and options menu. [/list]

text.description: Adds a Ware Overview tab to the Property Owned menu in the map. Lists all wares (by transport type) present at player-owned stations, with total stock, station count, production and consumption per hour. Each ware row is expandable to reveal a per-station breakdown.

Ajoute un onglet Aperçu des marchandises au menu Propriétés possédées dans la carte. Liste toutes les marchandises (par type de transport) présentes dans les stations appartenant au joueur, avec le stock total, le nombre de stations, la production et la consommation par heure. Chaque ligne de marchandise peut être développée pour révéler une ventilation par station.

Añade una pestaña de Vista general de mercancías al menú Propiedades poseídas en el mapa. Lista todas las mercancías (por tipo de transporte) presentes en las estaciones propiedad del jugador, con el stock total, el número de estaciones, la producción y el consumo por hora. Cada fila de mercancía se puede expandir para revelar un desglose por estación.

Aggiunge una scheda Panoramica merci al menu Proprietà possedute nella mappa. Elenca tutte le merci (per tipo di trasporto) presenti nelle stazioni di proprietà del giocatore, con il totale delle scorte, il numero di stazioni, la produzione e il consumo per ora. Ogni riga di merce può essere espansa per rivelare un dettaglio per stazione.

Přidává záložku Přehled zboží do menu Vlastněné nemovitosti v mapě. Zobrazuje všechny zboží (podle typu dopravy) přítomné na stanicích vlastněných hráčem, s celkovým stavem zásob, počtem stanic, výrobou a spotřebou za hodinu. Každý řádek zboží lze rozbalit pro zobrazení podrobností podle stanice.

Adds a Ware Overview tab to the Property Owned menu in the map. Lists all wares (by transport type) present at player-owned stations, with total stock, station count, production and consumption per hour. Each ware row is expandable to reveal a per-station breakdown.

Dodaje zakładkę Przegląd towarów do menu Własność w mapie. Wyświetla wszystkie towary (według rodzaju transportu) obecne na stacjach należących do gracza, z całkowitym stanem magazynowym, liczbą stacji, produkcją i zużyciem na godzinę. Każdy wiersz towaru można rozwinąć, aby zobaczyć szczegóły dla każdej stacji.

Fügt einen Tab 'Warenübersicht' zum Menü 'Eigentum' in der Karte hinzu. Listet alle Waren (nach Transporttyp) auf, die sich auf spielereigenen Stationen befinden, mit Gesamtbestand, Anzahl der Stationen, Produktion und Verbrauch pro Stunde. Jede Warenzeile kann erweitert werden, um eine detaillierte Aufschlüsselung pro Station anzuzeigen.

Adiciona uma aba de Visão Geral de Mercadorias ao menu Propriedades Possuídas no mapa. Lista todas as mercadorias (por tipo de transporte) presentes nas estações de propriedade do jogador, com estoque total, número de estações, produção e consumo por hora. Cada linha de mercadoria pode ser expandida para revelar um detalhamento por estação.
マップメニューのプレイヤー所有ステーションの情報パネルに商品概要タブを追加します。プレイヤー所有のステーションに存在するすべての商品（輸送タイプ別）を、総在庫、ステーション数、時間あたりの生産量と消費量とともに一覧表示します。各商品行は展開可能で、ステーションごとの詳細を表示できます。
지도 메뉴의 플레이어 소유 스테이션에 대한 정보 패널에 상품 개요 탭을 추가합니다. 플레이어 소유 스테이션에 존재하는 모든 상품(운송 유형별)을 총 재고, 스테이션 수, 시간당 생산 및 소비와 함께 나열합니다. 각 상품 행은 확장 가능하며, 스테이션별 세부 정보를 표시할 수 있습니다.
在地图菜单中为玩家拥有的空间站的信息面板添加商品概览选项卡。按类型列出所有商品的总库存、站点数量、每小时生产和消耗。每个商品行可以展开以显示每个站点的详细信息。
在地圖選單中為玩家擁有的空間站的資訊面板新增商品概覽標籤。按類型列出所有商品的總庫存、站點數量、每小時生產和消耗。每個商品行可以展開以顯示每個站點的詳細資訊。

Harita menüsünde oyuncuya ait istasyonlar için bilgi paneline bir Malzeme Genel Bakış sekmesi ekler. Tür bazında tüm malları toplam stok, istasyon sayısı, saatlik üretim ve tüketim ile listeler. Her mal satırı, istasyon bazında ayrıntıları göstermek için genişletilebilir.

Додає вкладку Огляд товарів до меню Власність на карті. Перераховує всі товари (за типом транспорту), що присутні на станціях, що належать гравцеві, з загальним запасом, кількістю станцій, виробництвом та споживанням за годину. Кожен рядок товару можна розгорнути, щоб показати деталі по станції.
